title: Designcenter X Solid Edge | Siemens
body: Designcenter X Designcenter X Solid Edge Designcenter Solid Edge software delivered in a secure SaaS environment. Try now Compare plans and pricing Designcenter X Solid Edge trial Gain access to the full version of Designcenter Solid Edge in a secure SaaS environment with your 30-day trial. Try now Why teams choose Designcenter X Solid Edge Designcenter X Solid Edge delivers product development software in a secure Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) environment, offering all the features you love in a flexible, cloud-based experience. Reduce IT complexity and costs with automatic updates and cloud-based built-in data management Seamlessly collaborate across disciplines and connect globally with colleagues and customers Access real-time assistance and minimize disruptions to your workflows with AI-powered features Download fact sheet GAIN SPEED AND FLEXIBILITY all Get started quickly Faster concept design, easy design changes at any stage and seamless multi-CAD interoperability. INCREASE PERFORMANCE all Access powerful tools Unmatched assembly performance, process-specific workflows and tools and intelligent automation. ENHANCE COLLABORATION all Manage files File sharing and collaboration from any device, bringing together internal and external stakeholders. Integrated cloud-based data management Trusted, integrated cloud-based data management capabilities are included with every seat of Designcenter X Solid Edge, allowing you to easily get started with effective, secure and trusted data management. These capabilities include real-time collaboration with easy search of your product designs and data. Check in and check out designs, participate in discussions and even mark-up 3D models to give context to your work. Create and manage revisions, freeze and release designs as well as assign and complete associated tasks. These features help improve productivity, streamline collaboration and ensure data integrity across design projects. Scalable tools for businesses of all sizes Designcenter Solid Edge Embedded Client is included (built-in PDM). Manage and control your CAD product data directly within Designcenter X Solid Edge, ensuring design revisions are secure and collaborative. As your business grows, easily scale and customize your PLM environment with the full capabilities of Teamcenter X. Start quickly with minimal IT administration, leveraging trusted and secure cloud-based architecture. Engage all team members with 3D visualization, intelligent search and markup tools, fostering better communication and innovation. AI-powered product development Leveraging the power of artificial intelligence (AI), Designcenter X Solid Edge delivers AI-productivity assistance that provides in-app product help, enabling you to quickly and easily find the information you’re looking for, improving efficiency and empowering innovation. Compare plans and pricing Get started with a monthly or annual Designcenter X Solid Edge subscription today. Additional subscription and licensing options are available through our global ecosystem of authorized Siemens Solution Partners . Contact your local partner for more information. Get your first month of Designcenter Solid Edge for $1 Get started instantly. New customers can get their first month for US $1. Cancel anytime. Redeem now 30% off Designcenter X Solid Edge: Automatic Drawings Upgrade design validation and optimization while reducing development costs with AI-powered drawing automation. See offer details Siemens Xcelerator portfolio Recognizing that there is an increasing need for more accessible, scalable and flexible solutions, the Siemens Xcelerator portfolio is now available via connection to the cloud. Utilize the technologies you know and love quickly and cost-effectively on the cloud with Designcenter X Solid Edge. Learn and keep pace with new solutions and collaborate securely across engineering domains. The Siemens Xcelerator portfolio gives you the power of the world’s most comprehensive digital twin in a flexible and scalable form. DESIGNCENTER SOLID EDGE Get started with a free trial Experience fast, flexible design changes, powerful assembly management, and seamless use of multi-CAD data with 30-day access to the full version of Designcenter Solid Edge. Try now Explore related products Designcenter Designcenter X NX Essentials Browser-based essential NX CAD, CAM and CAE tools. Create and edit NX data in a lightweight experience, with zero translation, from anywhere. Designcenter Solid Edge Value-Based Licensing Take advantage of flexible token packs shared across your team to access extended Designcenter Solid Edge functionality on demand.
